name: Hyperspell
what: Company brain: connects 50+ work tools (Slack, Gmail, Drive, Notion, Linear, Jira, Salesforce, HubSpot, GitHub) into one permission-aware, self-correcting context graph served to agents with citations.
why_tier: Full ingest+graph+permission+cite stack across many work SaaS for teams/agents — Astell's exact promise, incl. supersession/drift tracking; agent-infra vocabulary doesn't override the mechanics (Coworker.ai precedent), so scored up.
notes: YC F25; legal entity Digital Workers of California, Inc.; SOC2 + GDPR. Hits all four Astell pillars incl. pillar-2 open-loop/drift handling (retires stale info, resolves conflicts, tracks supersession). Closest single-product clone seen to date. [recovered 2026-06-16 from divergent local scan lineage; orig first_seen 2026-06-15]

name: Hyper
what: 'Company brain' that powers AI employees/agents — a self-maintaining knowledge graph giving agents persistent company context, pitched against MCP's statelessness ('MCP forgets everything by lunch').
why_tier: Company-brain + knowledge-graph mechanics squarely in Astell's lane, but agent-/dev-memory perimeter and very early (YC P26) — one product step from team-wide intelligence.
notes: YC Spring 2026 (P26); founders Shalin Shah, Kanyes Thaker. [recovered 2026-06-16 from divergent local scan lineage]

name: Solid
what: Automates creation/maintenance of 'context graphs' — auto-discovers and builds business-aware semantic models (metric definitions, entities, rules) across a company's data, queries and tools as a single source of truth for business meaning.
why_tier: Semantic/context-graph layer for enterprise data meaning over Snowflake/Databricks/BigQuery — data-vocabulary sibling of Tanderrum/Cube; one connector-set from the work-tool lane.
notes: $20M seed (Team8, SignalFire), Feb 2026; legal entity Solid Data, Inc.; founders Yoni Leitersdorf, Tal Segalov. [recovered 2026-06-16 from divergent local scan lineage]

name: Atomicwork
what: Agentic ITSM/ESM platform with a 'Universal Context' enterprise IT graph and AI enterprise search across work tools (Slack, Teams, Microsoft, Okta) for employee service.
why_tier: Employee IT/HR service assistant building a cross-tool 'enterprise graph' + search — Tier-2 employee-assist lane; one positioning step from general team intelligence.
notes: Stage approximate (Series A-stage ITSM/ESM vendor); HQ San Francisco / Bengaluru. [recovered 2026-06-16 from divergent local scan lineage]

name: xmemory
what: 'Write-time' memory layer that structures and cleans data as it is written so AI reads return high-precision, governable, auditable answers — reserving semantic search for only the most complex queries.
why_tier: Funded infra selling Astell's pillar-2/pillar-3 (graph memory + precision/citation) a la carte — same cluster as Cognee/Zep/Mem0/Supermemory, all tracked Tier 2 infra.
notes: GBP 3m (~$4m) pre-seed (Fly Ventures, Begin Capital, AAL VC, 33East, Inovia Capital), Mar 2026; founder Alex Petrov; closed beta. [recovered 2026-06-16 from divergent local scan lineage]
